title: News Corp to Report Fiscal 2023 Second Quarter Earnings
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--News Corp will release its second quarter Fiscal 2023 results on Thursday, February 9, 2023. News Corp Chief Executive Robert Thomson and Chief Financial Officer Susan Panuccio will discuss the results via a live audio webcast at 5:00 p.m. EST (Sydney: Friday, February 10, at 9:00 a.m. AEDT).

title: THE FIFTH Agency Expands Los Angeles Team with Key Hire to Lead Creative Team and Produce Creator-Driven Advertising
text: LOS ANGELES--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Award-winning, social-creative agency THE FIFTH, known for its viral creator marketing campaigns, today announced a crucial hire who will spearhead the growth of its Creative team in Los Angeles. With the aim of developing standout creator-driven campaigns in the U.S. market, the agency has already shown exciting promise, resulting in the need to expand the team to eight hires on the ground.

title: What made News Corp stock gain 10% on Wednesday?
text: Shares of New Corp (NASDAQ: NWS) are up nearly 10% on Wednesday after Rupert Murdoch scrapped plans of recombining the mass media company with Fox Corp (NASDAQ: FOX).

title: Rupert Murdoch scraps plans to reunite FOX and News Corp
text: Rupert Murdoch has backtracked on plans to reunite his broadcasting and publishing empires, FOX and News Corp (NASDAQ:NWS), nearly a decade after they were split. The 91-year-old media mogul and his son Lachlan said the proposed merger was “not optimal for shareholders,” in a press release, bringing an end to a plan originally laid out last autumn.

title: Murdoch abandons bid to reunite News Corp and Fox Corp
text: A proposed reunion of two parts of Rupert Murdoch's empire has been abandoned by the media tycoon.

title: Rupert Murdoch Scraps Plans To Reunite Fox And News Corp.
text: The decision will keep high-profile media outlets like the Wall Street Journal and Fox News in separate companies, both run by Murdoch and his family.

title: Fox Corporation and News Corp will not merge
text: Lachlan Murdoch announced Tuesday that Fox Corp. and News Corp. will not merge after a special committee explored a potential combination of the two companies.

title: Rupert Murdoch scraps plan to merge Fox and News Corp
text: Rupert Murdoch called off his effort to merge the two parts of his media empire, News Corp NWS and Fox Corp. FOX, saying the transaction “is not optimal” for shareholders of the companies at this time.

title: Rupert Murdoch's News Corp. And Fox Abandon Potential Merger After Special Committee Found “A Combination Is Not Optimal For Shareholders”
text: News Corp. and Fox Corp., both controlled by Rupert Murdoch, have abandoned a potential merger after a special committee determined that “a combination is not optimal for shareholders.” Multiple shareholders in the companies had expressed their opposition to the merger in recent months.

title: Rupert Murdoch calls off proposed Fox-News Corp merger
text: Rupert Murdoch calls off proposed Fox-News Corp merger

title: Announcement by News Corp's Board of Directors on Potential Combination with Fox Corporation
text: NEW YORK--( BUSINESS WIRE )--News Corporation (“News Corp” or the “Company”) (Nasdaq: NWS, NWSA; ASX: NWS, NWSLV) announced today that the Company's Board of Directors received a letter from K. Rupert Murdoch withdrawing the proposal to explore a potential combination of News Corp and Fox Corporation (“FOX”) (Nasdaq: FOXA, FOX).

title: News Corp's Stock Down 15% Over Last Year, What's Next?
text: After a 15% decline over the last year, at the current price of around $19 per share, we believe News Corp stock (NASDAQ: NWSA), a global, diversified media and information services company, is fairly priced.

title: Fox Corp., News Corp will stay at Midtown HQ for another 20 years
text: Changes overseen by asset manager Hines are to include a renovated main Sixth Avenue, lobby, upgrades to the outdoor plaza, and creation of a new 47th Street lobby.
